title: I’m 60, retired with $3 million. My fiancée, 55, only has $1 million and plans to keep working. Are we compatible?
summary: A 60-year-old retiree with $3 million seeks financial compatibility advice regarding a 55-year-old fiancée with $1 million in savings who plans to continue working despite being frugal but inactive in investing.
content: “Although she is quite frugal, she has not been particularly diligent with investing.”

zh.title: 我60岁，已退休，有300万美元。我的未婚妻55岁，只有100万美元，计划继续工作。我们相容吗？
zh.summary: 一位拥有300万美元的60岁退休人士寻求财务兼容性建议，关于他55岁的未婚妻，她拥有100万美元的储蓄，计划继续工作，尽管她很节俭但在投资方面不活跃。

title: Social Security insolvency is ‘entirely solvable,’ says commissioner under Biden
summary: A Biden-era Social Security commissioner asserts that the program's insolvency crisis can be resolved, though implementation of solutions will prove challenging.
content: The solution is simple — but it won’t be easy.

zh.title: 拜登政府社会保障委员表示，社会保障破产问题"完全可以解决"
zh.summary: 拜登时代的社会保障委员声称该计划的破产危机可以得到解决，尽管解决方案的实施将面临挑战。

title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Stock markets responded positively as oil prices fell and the Dow climbed over 900 points Thursday following President Trump's announcement of an impending Iran deal.
content: Oil prices fell and the Dow Industrials soared more than 900 points Thursday after President Trump said the U.S. will soon sign a deal with Iran.

zh.title: 周五的大盘故事：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统宣布伊朗协议即将达成后，油价下跌，道琼斯指数周四上涨超过900点，股市做出积极反应。

title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 million shares at $135 each for $75 billion in the largest IPO on record, ahead of its Nasdaq debut.
content: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.

zh.title: SpaceX以创纪录的IPO筹集750亿美元，等待纳斯达克上市
zh.summary: SpaceX以每股135美元的价格出售5.556亿股，筹集750亿美元，创造了历史上最大的IPO纪录，并准备在纳斯达克上市。

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX raises $75bn ahead of record stock market debut
summary: SpaceX's $75 billion IPO is expected to make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire as the company prepares for its stock market debut.
content: The public sale is also expected to make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的SpaceX在创纪录的股市首次亮相前筹集750亿美元
zh.summary: SpaceX的750亿美元IPO预计将使埃隆·马斯克成为世界上第一位万亿富翁，该公司正在准备其股市首次亮相。

title: My golf buddy worked as a financial adviser. Here’s how I knew his friendship was fake.
summary: A golf enthusiast recounts recognizing that his friend's financial adviser background masked an insincere friendship based on superficial popularity.
content: “He always mentioned how popular I was.”

zh.title: 我的高尔夫球友是理财顾问——我是如何识破他友谊虚假的
zh.summary: 一位高尔夫爱好者讲述了他如何识别出朋友的理财顾问身份背后隐藏着虚伪的友谊，这份友谊建立在表面的受欢迎程度之上。

title: Why the economics makes this the craziest world cup ever
summary: The 2026 World Cup presents unique economic challenges including trade wars and soaring ticket prices, revealing significant shifts in the global economy.
content: From trade wars to soaring ticket prices, the 2026 World Cup is unlike any before it. Faisal Islam explores what this tournament reveals about our changing global economy.

zh.title: 经济学为什么使2026年世界杯成为有史以来最疯狂的
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯面临独特的经济挑战，包括贸易战和门票价格飙升，这些反映了全球经济的重大变化。

title: India's 'blue gold' starts a new drinks industry
summary: India is developing a new spirits industry by harvesting wild agave plants and distilling them, creating a novel beverage market.
content: Agave plants grow wild in India and new distillers are using them to create a spirits industry.

zh.title: 印度的"蓝金"开启了新的酒精饮料产业
zh.summary: 印度正在通过采集野生龙舌兰植物并将其蒸馏成烈酒来开发新的饮料产业，开创了新的饮料市场。

title: My friends always want to split the bill equally, how do I say no?
summary: A diner seeks advice on how to politely decline splitting restaurant bills equally when fellow diners propose the arrangement.
content: It is never easy to speak up when a fellow diner says "let's just divide it!"

zh.title: 我的朋友总想平均分摊账单，我怎样才能拒绝？
zh.summary: 一位食客寻求建议，想了解当同餐人士提议平均分摊餐厅账单时，如何礼貌地拒绝。

title: Warren questions SpaceX IPO oversight in new letter to stock indexes
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren sent a letter to stock index providers questioning changes to waiting periods and investor protections related to SpaceX's IPO.
content: Sen. Elizabeth Warren seeking answers on changes to index provider waiting periods, protections for retail investors, in a letter obtained first by CNBC.

zh.title: 沃伦在致股票指数的新信中质疑SpaceX IPO监管
zh.summary: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦向股票指数提供商发送信函，质疑与SpaceX IPO相关的等待期和投资者保护措施的变化。

title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
summary: SpaceX plans to allocate only around 20% of its IPO shares to retail investors, directing the majority of the offering to institutional buyers.
content: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

zh.title: SpaceX将零售IPO配额削减至约20%，消息人士称
zh.summary: SpaceX计划仅向零售投资者分配约20%的IPO股票，将发行中的大部分股份指向机构投资者。

title: Adobe is losing another top executive, and investors don’t like it
summary: Adobe's stock fell further following another top executive departure, pushing the price to a seven-year low. The leadership exodus signals investor concerns about the company's direction and stability. The market reaction underscores how executive turnover can damage investor confidence in major tech firms.
content: Adobe’s stock falls further, after closing Thursday at the lowest price in more than seven years.

zh.title: Adobe再失高管，投资者不看好
zh.summary: 又一位高管离职后，Adobe股价进一步下跌，跌至七年低点。高管大量离职表明投资者对公司方向和稳定性的担忧。市场反应凸显了高管流失如何损害投资者对大型科技公司的信心。

title: The SpaceX IPO is drawing historic demand from foreign investors. But don’t expect a dollar-buying frenzy.
summary: SpaceX's upcoming IPO is attracting unprecedented international investor interest, though foreign buyers are not rushing to purchase dollars alongside equity stakes. Foreign investors remain selective despite appetite for American tech companies. The pattern reveals cautious optimism in global capital markets regarding U.S. currency prospects.
content: Foreign investors are willing to bet on U.S. companies that are IPO-bound, but not on the dollar itself, according to FX analysts

zh.title: SpaceX首次公开募股吸引海外投资者历史性需求，但别指望美元购买狂潮
zh.summary: SpaceX即将进行的首次公开募股吸引了前所未有的国际投资者兴趣，尽管外国买家并未急于购买美元来获取股权。尽管对美国科技公司有兴趣，外国投资者仍保持选择性。这一模式反映了全球资本市场对美元前景的谨慎乐观态度。

title: We asked AI to predict the 2026 World Cup winner. It picked a team that’s never won.
summary: AI models analyzing the 2026 World Cup made unconventional predictions, selecting an underdog nation that has never won the tournament. This contrasts with traditional forecasts favoring historically dominant teams. The divergence suggests AI's different approach to pattern recognition compared to human intuition and historical bias.
content: Some 2026 World Cup predictions from AI models are going against tradition to pick the underdogs. Here’s why.

zh.title: 我们请AI预测2026年世界杯冠军，它选了从未赢过的队伍
zh.summary: 分析2026年世界杯的AI模型做出了非常规预测，选择了一个从未赢过该赛事的弱旅国家。这与传统预测偏好历史主导球队形成对比。这种分歧表明AI在模式识别方面的方法不同于人的直觉和历史偏见。

title: What energy insiders in DC are saying about oil prices and a possible Iran deal
summary: Energy industry insiders at the Global Energy Forum in Washington are discussing the implications of potential Iran negotiations on global oil prices. The discussions reflect uncertainty about how geopolitical developments could reshape energy markets. These insider perspectives provide context for understanding energy policy dynamics.
content: Brian Sullivan shares his insight from the sidelines of the Global Energy Forum in Washington, DC.

zh.title: 华盛顿能源业内人士谈论油价和伊朗协议的可能性
zh.summary: 全球能源论坛上的能源业内人士正在讨论潜在伊朗谈判对全球油价的影响。这些讨论反映了人们对地缘政治发展如何重塑能源市场的不确定性。这些业内人士的观点为理解能源政策动态提供了背景信息。

title: Foster children are getting their own version of ‘Trump accounts,’ but major questions remain
summary: Foster children are gaining access to dedicated savings accounts modeled on the administration's initiative, though implementation details remain unclear. States are responsible for enrollment, but the long-term framework and protections are still undefined. The program aims to build wealth for vulnerable youth but faces significant unanswered questions.
content: States will be responsible for the sign-up process, but it’s unclear what happens after that.

zh.title: 寄养儿童获得他们自己版本的"特朗普账户"，但仍有重大问题
zh.summary: 寄养儿童正在获得基于政府倡议的专用储蓄账户，尽管实施细节仍不清楚。各州负责注册，但长期框架和保护措施仍未确定。该计划旨在为弱势青年积累财富，但面临许多悬而未决的问题。

title: Ex-Andreessen Horowitz partner slams his old firm, other VCs for 'political infiltration' around AI
summary: John O'Farrell, a former Andreessen Horowitz partner, criticized his former firm and other venture capitalists for what he characterizes as "political infiltration" through AI-focused PACs. O'Farrell specifically cited the Leading the Future PAC as attempting to influence politicians. The clash exposes internal disagreements within the venture capital community over AI governance advocacy.
content: John O'Farrell, former partner at Andreessen Horowitz, says the PAC Leading the Future, backed by his old firm, is trying to "intimidate politicians."

zh.title: 前Andreessen Horowitz合伙人抨击其前公司和其他风投因AI方面的"政治渗透"
zh.summary: 前Andreessen Horowitz合伙人约翰·奥法雷尔批评他的前公司和其他风险资本家通过专注于AI的政治行动委员会进行"政治渗透"。奥法雷尔特别提到了"引领未来"政治行动委员会试图影响政治家。这一冲突暴露了风险投资社区内部对AI治理倡导的内部分歧。

title: Healthy Returns: CVS Health executives on reducing healthcare's biggest pain points
summary: CVS Health executives discussed how the company is leveraging AI and technology to address administrative inefficiencies in healthcare delivery. The focus is on reducing provider and patient burden while improving care experiences. CVS's efforts reflect broader industry trends toward technology-driven healthcare optimization.
content: CVS Health execs discuss how the company is using AI and other technologies to reduce administrative burdens and deliver more proactive care experiences.

zh.title: 健康回报：CVS Health高管谈如何减少医疗行业的最大痛点
zh.summary: CVS Health高管讨论了该公司如何利用人工智能和技术来解决医疗服务中的行政效率问题。重点是减少医疗提供者和患者的负担，同时改善就医体验。CVS的努力反映了整个行业向技术驱动的医疗优化发展的大趋势。

title: Nearly 7 million student loan borrowers remain in defunct Biden-era payment plan: Trump official
summary: Approximately 7 million student loan borrowers remain enrolled in the SAVE repayment plan, which was discontinued, risking unaffordable payments and default. According to Trump administration officials, these borrowers face potential billing consequences if not transferred to alternative plans. The situation highlights the impact of policy reversals on vulnerable borrower populations.
content: Millions of student loan borrowers who've lingered in the SAVE plan are at risk of getting billed unaffordable payments and eventually falling into default.

zh.title: 近700万学生贷款借款人仍留在已停用的拜登时代还款计划中：特朗普官员
zh.summary: 约700万学生贷款借款人仍然被纳入已停用的SAVE还款计划中，面临支付负担过重和违约的风险。根据特朗普政府官员的说法，如果这些借款人不转入替代计划，将面临潜在的账单后果。这一情况突出了政策逆转对弱势借款人群体的影响。

title: Eaton moves one step closer to becoming a cleaner bet on the AI boom
summary: Auto parts manufacturer Dana has agreed to merge its Mobility business with Eaton in a $5.1 billion transaction. The deal positions Eaton to capitalize on growing demand for advanced automotive technologies and AI applications. The merger reflects consolidation trends as the industry adapts to electrification and automation.
content: Auto parts manufacturer Dana has agreed to combine with Eaton's Mobility business in a deal that values the unit at $5.1 billion.

zh.title: 伊顿更接近成为AI繁荣中更清晰的押注
zh.summary: 汽车零部件制造商Dana同意将其移动业务以51亿美元的价格与伊顿合并。该交易使伊顿能够利用对先进汽车技术和人工智能应用日益增长的需求。该合并反映了随着行业适应电气化和自动化而出现的整合趋势。

title: Trump picks former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director
summary: Trump has selected former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director, replacing his earlier choice of Bill Pulte after House Democratic objections. The announcement comes amid debate over the expiration of Section 702 of FISA, a key surveillance authority. The decision signals a shift in Trump's intelligence leadership amid tensions over foreign surveillance powers.
content: Trump's announcement came after objections by House Democrats to his selection of Bill Pulte as acting DNI ensured that Section 702 of FISA will expire Friday.

zh.title: 特朗普任命前美证交会主席杰伊·克莱顿为国家情报局长
zh.summary: 特朗普选择前美证券交易委员会主席杰伊·克莱顿担任国家情报局长，替换了因众议院民主党人反对而失利的比尔·普尔特。这一宣布出现在关于《外国情报监控法》第702条款到期的争议背景下，该条款是一项关键的监视权限。这一决定标志着特朗普在外国监视权力紧张局势中情报领导层的转变。

title: Oil tanker CEO sees Hormuz ship traffic quickly increasing if U.S. and Iran reach a deal
summary: Frontline CEO Lars Barstad expects maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz to increase rapidly if the U.S. and Iran reach a diplomatic agreement. Shipowners are currently delaying passage through the strategic chokepoint pending improved threat assessments. The statement indicates substantial pent-up shipping demand contingent on improved U.S.-Iran relations.
content: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.

zh.title: 油轮公司首席执行官预计若美国和伊朗达成协议荷美尔兹海峡船舶交通将快速增加
zh.summary: 前沿公司首席执行官拉尔斯·巴尔斯塔德预计，如果美国和伊朗达成外交协议，通过霍尔木兹海峡的海上交通将迅速增加。船主目前正在等待威胁评估改善后再通过这一战略要道。这一声明表明，大量船运需求的释放取决于美国伊朗关系的改善。

title: Trump cancels Iran strikes scheduled for Thursday evening
summary: President Trump canceled planned military strikes on Iran scheduled for Thursday evening, reversing threats made hours earlier to attack "VERY HARD TONIGHT." Trump had also warned of seizing Iran's oil infrastructure, including Kharg Island. The sudden reversal marks a dramatic shift in the administration's Iran policy posture.
content: Hours earlier, Trump warned that the U.S. would attack Iran "VERY HARD TONIGHT," and soon take over Iran's oil infrastructure assets, including Kharg Island.

zh.title: 特朗普取消原定周四晚间对伊朗的军事打击
zh.summary: 特朗普总统取消了原定周四晚间对伊朗的军事打击计划，推翻了数小时前进行"非常猛烈"今晚攻击的威胁。特朗普还曾警告将夺取伊朗的石油基础设施，包括霍尔木兹岛。这一突然逆转标志着特朗普政府伊朗政策立场的剧烈转变。

title: Intel soars on double upgrade from BofA. Here's what Jim Cramer says investors must do
summary: Intel's stock surged after Bank of America issued a double upgrade on the semiconductor manufacturer. CNBC's Jim Cramer advised investors to buy Intel stock for those not already holding the position. The analyst upgrades signal renewed confidence in Intel's competitive prospects and financial recovery.
content: Jim Cramer said investors who don't own any Intel need to get in.

zh.title: 英特尔因美银双升级而飙升。吉姆·克莱默说投资者必须做什么
zh.summary: 英特尔股票在美国银行对这家芯片制造商发布双升级后飙升。美国全国广播公司的吉姆·克莱默建议尚未持有该股票的投资者购买英特尔股票。分析师升级表示对英特尔竞争前景和财务复苏的重新信心。

title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
summary: Prediction market traders on Polymarket believe SpaceX will debut with a valuation exceeding $2 trillion, joining an exclusive six-company club at that valuation tier. The IPO would represent a historic milestone for Elon Musk's aerospace company. Early investors face potential extraordinary returns from the company's remarkable value creation.
content: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies boasting a market value beyond $2 trillion.

zh.title: 预测市场交易者表示SpaceX上市时市值将超过2万亿美元
zh.summary: Polymarket上的预测市场交易者认为SpaceX上市估值将超过2万亿美元，加入该估值层级的专属六家公司俱乐部。首次公开募股将代表埃隆·马斯克航空航天公司的历史里程碑。早期投资者面临该公司非凡价值创造带来的潜在超额回报。

title: Trump administration appeals ruling blocking $100,000 H-1B fee
summary: The Trump administration is appealing a court ruling that blocked a $100,000 fee on H-1B visa applications. The original decision found Trump exceeded his executive authority by imposing the fee without congressional approval. The appeal reflects the administration's determination to enforce stricter H-1B visa policies.
content: The appeal follows a ruling that President Donald Trump exceeded his authority by imposing a $100,000 H-1B visa application fee without approval from Congress.

zh.title: 特朗普政府对阻止10万美元H-1B费用的裁决提出上诉
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在对法院裁决提出上诉，该裁决阻止了H-1B签证申请中10万美元费用的征收。原始判决认为特朗普在没有国会批准的情况下征收费用超越了他的行政权力。上诉反映了政府实施更严格H-1B签证政策的决心。

title: Foreign surveillance program to expire Friday after House blocks extension
summary: The U.S. House rejected a short-term extension of Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act, allowing the surveillance authority to expire Friday. Section 702 grants the government broad powers for foreign intelligence collection without individual warrants. The House action marks a significant moment in ongoing debate over surveillance authority and privacy rights.
content: The U.S. House rejected a short-term extension of Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act. The surveillance authority expires Friday.

zh.title: 众议院阻止延期后，外国监控计划周五到期
zh.summary: 美国众议院拒绝了《外国情报监控法》第702条的短期延期，导致该监控权限在周五失效。第702条赋予政府在没有个人授权令的情况下进行外国情报收集的广泛权力。众议院的行动标志着关于监控权限和隐私权的持续辩论中的一个重要时刻。

title: Bitcoin at $1 million? The math points to a wildly different number.
summary: A MarketWatch analysis suggests Bitcoin's long-term returns may be substantially lower than popular $1 million price predictions, with mathematical models pointing to near-zero long-term gains. The counterintuitive conclusion challenges bullish crypto narratives circulating among investors. The realistic outlook may paradoxically provide the foundation for sustainable cryptocurrency adoption.
content: The cryptocurrency’s long-term return may be close to zero — and that could be exactly what it needs.

zh.title: 比特币达到100万美元？数学指向一个完全不同的数字
zh.summary: MarketWatch的分析表明，比特币的长期回报可能远低于流行的100万美元价格预测，数学模型指向接近零的长期收益。这一违反直觉的结论挑战了投资者中流传的看涨加密货币叙事。现实的前景可能矛盾地为可持续的加密货币采用奠定基础。

title: Oil prices drop as Trump backs away from his threat of strikes on Iran
summary: Oil prices declined Thursday after President Trump canceled planned military strikes against Iran, reversing threats made earlier in the day. The reversal reduced geopolitical risk premium in energy markets. Oil market moves reflect investor sensitivity to U.S.-Iran tensions and military escalation risks.
content: Oil prices dropped Thursday after President Donald Trump said he was canceling planned fresh strikes on Iran, pulling back from his threat earlier in the day.

zh.title: 油价下跌，特朗普退缩对伊朗的军事威胁
zh.summary: 周四，在特朗普总统取消对伊朗的计划军事行动后，油价下跌，推翻了当天早些时候做出的威胁。这一反转减少了能源市场中的地缘政治风险溢价。石油市场的变动反映了投资者对美国-伊朗紧张局势和军事升级风险的敏感性。

title: SpaceX IPO will test how Wall Street prices ‘strategic tech’
summary: SpaceX's upcoming IPO will test Wall Street's ability to value "strategic technology" companies that defy traditional sector classifications. The aerospace company shares characteristics with firms like Palantir in operating at the intersection of commercial and national security interests. The IPO pricing will establish benchmarks for valuing strategically important technology firms.
content: Elon Musk's SpaceX defies typical market buckets, and the IPO will give Wall Street another chance to value "strategic tech" like Palantir.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO将检验华尔街如何对"战略科技"进行估值
zh.summary: 即将进行的SpaceX IPO将检验华尔街对不符合传统行业分类的"战略技术"公司的估值能力。这家航空航天公司与Palantir等公司有相似之处,都在商业和国家安全利益的交叉点上运营。IPO定价将为战略性重要科技公司的估值建立基准。

title: There’s a ticking time bomb under the Paramount-Warner Bros. deal. Here’s what could set it off.
summary: The proposed Paramount Skydance-Warner Bros. Discovery merger faces a regulatory "ticking time bomb" that could trigger substantial additional costs for Paramount if regulators slow approval. While Hollywood stakeholders have resisted the deal, the primary financial threat comes from regulatory delays increasing Paramount's liabilities. Deal timing and regulatory speed are now critical determinants of financial viability.
content: The merger of Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery has been met with resistance from many in Hollywood — but the real threat will come from additional costs Paramount could incur if regulators slow down the deal.

zh.title: 派拉蒙-华纳兄弟交易暗藏计时炸弹。以下是可能引爆它的因素。
zh.summary: 拟议的派拉蒙Skydance-华纳兄弟Discovery合并面临监管"计时炸弹",如果监管机构减缓批准,可能会给派拉蒙带来巨大的额外成本。虽然好莱坞利益相关者反对该交易,但主要的财务威胁来自监管延迟增加派拉蒙的负债。交易时间和监管速度现在是决定财务可行性的关键因素。

title: SpaceX IPO won’t ‘break’ the bull market. But investors are worried about what comes next
summary: Wall Street analysts believe the stock market has sufficient capacity to absorb new SpaceX IPO shares without disrupting the current bull market. However, investors remain concerned about broader market implications and forward-looking conditions beyond the transaction. The sentiment reflects confidence in market resilience paired with underlying apprehension about economic headwinds.
content: As far as Wall Street is concerned, the stock market has what it takes to absorb the new supply.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO不会"打破"牛市。但投资者担心接下来会发生什么
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师认为股票市场有足够的容量来吸收新的SpaceX IPO股份,而不会扰乱当前的牛市。然而,投资者仍然对交易之外的更广泛的市场影响和前瞻性条件感到担忧。这种情绪反映了对市场韧性的信心,同时也伴随着对经济逆风的潜在忧虑。

title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
summary: Early SpaceX investors stand to realize extraordinary returns as the company seeks an IPO valuation near $1.8 trillion. The potential gains represent some of the largest paper profits in venture capital history. The remarkable value creation underscores the outsized returns possible in visionary technology companies.
content: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

zh.title: 从初创公司到1.8万亿美元：冒险投资SpaceX的投资者现在收获回报
zh.summary: 随着公司寻求近1.8万亿美元的IPO估值，早期SpaceX投资者将获得非凡回报。这些潜在收益代表了风险投资历史上最大的账面利润之一。这种显著的价值创造强调了在具有远见的科技公司中可能实现的巨大回报。

title: Pimco is warning about a spike in defaults — How it says income investors should position portfolios
summary: Investment firm Pimco is cautioning fixed-income investors to avoid lower-quality credit amid warnings of rising default rates. However, Pimco identifies substantial opportunities in high-quality bonds and assets for income-focused portfolios. The guidance suggests a bifurcated credit market where quality differentiation will drive investor returns.
content: Pimco is warning fixed-income investors to stay away from lower-quality credit, but sees plenty of opportunities in high-quality assets.

zh.title: Pimco警告违约率飙升——该公司建议收益投资者如何配置投资组合
zh.summary: 投资公司Pimco警告固定收益投资者在违约率上升的警告中避免低质量信用。然而，Pimco在高质量债券和收益型投资组合资产中发现了实质性机会。该指导建议存在一个分化的信用市场，其中质量差异将推动投资者回报。

title: Villagers take fight against Lidl store plans to Welsh government
summary: Welsh residents are escalating opposition to a proposed Lidl supermarket store by taking their case to the Welsh government. The community objects to the store's planned location on land between villages of Llantwit Major and Llanmaes. The action reflects ongoing local tension between retail development and community preservation.
content: Residents in the area do not want a store on land separating Llantwit Major and Llanmaes.

zh.title: 村民将反对Lidl门店计划的斗争上诉至威尔士政府
zh.summary: 威尔士居民正在向威尔士政府上诉，升级对拟议Lidl超市的反对。社区反对该门店的计划地点位于Llantwit Major和Llanmaes两村之间的土地上。这一行动反映了零售开发与社区保护之间的持续地方紧张关系。

title: Iran threatens Elon Musk's companies in Middle East: Iranian state media
summary: Iran's state media has designated all of Elon Musk's companies operating in the Middle East as military targets in retaliation against the U.S. This threat represents escalating geopolitical tensions that could directly affect major private sector operations like SpaceX and Tesla in the region.
content: Iran will consider all of Elon Musk's companies in the Middle East as military targets as it retaliates against the U.S., Iranian state media reported.

zh.title: 伊朗威胁埃隆·马斯克的中东企业：伊朗官方媒体
zh.summary: 伊朗官方媒体已将埃隆·马斯克在中东运营的所有公司列为军事目标，作为对美国的报复。这一威胁代表了不断升级的地缘政治紧张局势，可能直接影响该地区SpaceX和Tesla等主要私营部门运营。

title: Trump threatens to seize Iran's oil export terminal Kharg Island and take 'total control' of its energy industry
summary: President Trump has threatened to seize Iran's Kharg Island oil export terminal and take control of the country's broader energy infrastructure, drawing comparisons to prior U.S. actions in Venezuela. The announcement signals an aggressive economic and strategic posture toward Iran.
content: Trump said the forthcoming operations to take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets, would be similar to U.S. actions in Venezuela.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁夺取伊朗哈格岛油气出口终端并"全面控制"其能源产业
zh.summary: 特朗普总统威胁夺取伊朗哈格岛油气出口终端并控制该国更广泛的能源基础设施，与之前美国在委内瑞拉的行动形成对比。该声明表明对伊朗采取了激进的经济和战略立场。

title: Paper plant closure fears spark community protest
summary: Workers and families in Launceston protested the potential closure of a paper plant that would eliminate 167 jobs. The demonstration reflects widespread concern about the economic impact on the local community.
content: Workers and families held a demonstration with 167 jobs at risk at the site in Launceston.

zh.title: 纸浆厂关闭威胁引发社区抗议
zh.summary: 兰塞斯顿工人和家庭对纸浆厂潜在关闭进行了抗议，该关闭将导致167个工作岗位流失。这次示威反映了社区对当地经济影响的广泛担忧。

title: Baldwin, Khanna propose new direct foreign investment review board to probe Trump's deals
summary: Democratic Senators Tammy Baldwin and Rep. Ro Khanna have proposed a new direct foreign investment review board to scrutinize President Trump's courting of foreign investment. The move addresses concerns about potentially problematic foreign capital inflows.

title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
summary: U.S. wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, significantly exceeding economist expectations of 0.7%, driven primarily by a surge in energy costs as measured by the producer price index. The higher-than-expected inflation indicates sustained pricing pressure on businesses and the broader economy.
content: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

zh.title: 五月份批发价格上升1.1%，超出预期，主要受能源价格上涨驱动

title: Samsung, one of the world’s hottest stocks, is hit by insider-trading probe
summary: Samsung is facing an insider-trading investigation amid a remarkable 150% stock rally so far this year, fueled by South Korean retail investors betting on continued gains due to favorable memory chip supply-demand dynamics. The probe adds regulatory risk to one of 2026's strongest-performing stocks.
content: Samsung shares have rallied 150% so far this year with Korea’s army of retail investors speculating on further gains as the supply=demand imbalance in memory chips shows no sign of abating.

zh.title: 全球最热门股票之一的三星遭内幕交易调查

title: Shiny new toy: Retail traders are dumping AI favorites for SpaceX
summary: Individual investors have rotated away from traditional AI stocks including Micron, Advanced Micro Devices, and Marvell, shifting capital toward SpaceX ahead of its anticipated IPO. The movement reflects changing sentiment within the retail trading community regarding which sectors offer the most attractive opportunities.
content: Individual investors have dumped stocks including Micron, Advanced Micro Devices and Marvell.

title: Will UK interest rates go up?
summary: The Bank of England's interest rate decisions directly impact mortgage, loan, and savings rates for millions of British households and businesses. This article examines the outlook for UK rates and the potential economic consequences of the central bank's policy decisions.
content: The interest rate set by the Bank of England affects mortgage, loan and savings rates for millions.

zh.title: 英国利率会上升吗？

title: ECB hikes interest rates for first time since 2023 as Iran war ramps up energy costs
summary: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time since 2023 while also increasing inflation forecasts and cutting economic growth projections as energy costs surge due to escalating Iran tensions. The divergent rate action reflects heightened economic uncertainty across the eurozone.
content: The European Central Bank also raised its inflation forecasts and cut its growth outlook.

zh.title: 伊朗战争推高能源成本，欧洲央行时隔三年来首次加息
zh.summary: 欧洲央行时隔2023年以来首次上调利率，同时提高通胀预期、下调经济增长预测，因伊朗局势升级导致能源成本飙升。这一加息行动反映了欧元区经济不确定性的上升。

title: DoorDash lets customers use photos, prompts to order food and book reservations in latest AI push
summary: DoorDash is introducing AI features that enable customers to order food and book reservations using photos and natural language prompts rather than traditional search and navigation. The initiative represents the company's latest effort to streamline the user experience through artificial intelligence.
content: DoorDash wants to let users simplify the ordering and reservation process through AI.

zh.title: DoorDash推出AI功能，用户可通过照片和提示词订餐和预订
zh.summary: DoorDash推出AI功能，使用户能够通过照片和自然语言提示词订餐和预订，而不是依靠传统搜索和导航。这一举措代表了该公司通过人工智能简化用户体验的最新努力。

title: Planning to ‘flip’ SpaceX IPO shares? Be prepared to pay the price.
summary: While retail investors will receive a substantial allocation of SpaceX IPO shares, they will face significant financial penalties if they attempt to sell positions too quickly after the listing. The restrictions are designed to discourage rapid share flipping and maintain listing stability.
content: A large portion of IPO shares will be allocated to retail investors, but they face penalties if they sell too soon.

zh.title: 计划炒作SpaceX IPO股票？做好付出代价的准备

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: SpaceX, Nvidia, Tesla, Intel, Micron, Oracle, Meta, AMD & more

title: Wholesale inflation surges again and keeps the pressure on businesses and the U.S. economy
summary: U.S. wholesale prices in May recorded their largest back-to-back increases since 2022, intensifying cost pressures on businesses as they grapple with another wave of inflation. The sustained wholesale price growth threatens to squeeze business margins and slow broader economic expansion.
content: Wholesale prices in May posted the biggest back-to-back increases since 2022 and kept the pressure on businesses as they try to navigate another wave of U.S. inflation.

zh.title: 批发通胀再次激增，持续对企业和美国经济施压
zh.summary: 美国5月批发价格创下2022年以来最大的连续增幅，加剧了企业面临的成本压力。持续的批发价格增长威胁着企业利润率，可能减缓经济扩张步伐。

title: Big Tech is preventing new stock-market highs as investors change the way they play AI, says this top strategist
summary: Nomura strategist Charlie McElligott argues that excessive market concentration among AI-leading megacap stocks is preventing broader stock market advances as investors recognize the structural risks of such portfolio concentration. The observation signals potential investor rotation away from the most heavily weighted AI plays.
content: Nomura’s Charlie McElligott says investors are finally waking up to the problems with a market that is too concentrated on AI leadership.

zh.title: 顶级策略师称科技巨头阻止股市创新高，因投资者改变AI投资策略

title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with children

title: Hugo Boss pops 6% after top shareholder Frasers launches $2 billion takeover offer

zh.summary: Frasers Group发起20亿美元收购要约后，Hugo Boss股价上涨6%，该集团已拥有这家时尚零售商约26%的股份。

summary: U.S. stock futures rose following American military strikes on Iran, though earlier losses in chip stocks and Middle East tensions had weighed on markets overall.

content: Oracle topped quarterly expectations, but free cash flow is negative, and the company plans to raise more capital for data center projects.

zh.title: 甲骨文盈利超预期，但因融资200亿美元计划股价下跌
zh.summary: 甲骨文超过了季度盈利预期，但宣布计划筹集200亿美元用于数据中心扩展，因负自由现金流引发的担忧抵消了投资者的热情。资本需求反映了AI基础设施投资的高成本。

title: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
summary: A homeowner questions whether they should pay additional charges after a plumber's repair work created a new problem with their toilet's constantly refilling cistern. The column addresses consumer rights when service work results in additional issues.
content: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”

zh.title: 水管工收费160美元修理马桶水箱，但制造了新问题。我应该再付钱吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主质疑在水管工的维修工作导致其马桶水箱持续加水的新问题后，他们是否应该支付额外费用。该专栏讨论了当服务工作导致额外问题时的消费者权益。
